result.stderr:
OutWit.Web.Generator 1.3.4+15e5032fcf0a8386835a41cb560002e6abef69f0
Copyright © 2026 Dmitry Ratner

  -s, --site                     Required. Path to the site project directory.

  -o, --output                   Output directory (defaults to site/wwwroot).

  -u, --url                      Site URL (reads from site.config.json if not
                                 specified).

  --skip-sitemap                 (Default: false) Skip sitemap.xml and
                                 robots.txt generation.

  --skip-search                  (Default: false) Skip search-index.json
                                 generation.

  --skip-rss                     (Default: false) Skip RSS feed generation.

  --skip-static                  (Default: false) Skip static HTML pages
                                 generation.

  --og-images                    (Default: false) Generate OG images using
                                 Playwright.

  --force-og                     (Default: false) Force regeneration of OG
                                 images even if they exist.

  --search-content-max-length    (Default: 10000) Maximum content length for
                                 search index entries (default: 10000).

  -h, --hosting                  (Default: cloudflare) Hosting provider
                                 (cloudflare, netlify, vercel, github, none).

  --help                         Display this help screen.

  --version                      Display version information.

OutWit.Web.Generator 1.3.4+15e5032fcf0a8386835a41cb560002e6abef69f0
Copyright © 2026 Dmitry Ratner

  -s, --site                     Required. Path to the site project directory.

  -o, --output                   Output directory (defaults to site/wwwroot).

  -u, --url                      Site URL (reads from site.config.json if not
                                 specified).

  --skip-sitemap                 (Default: false) Skip sitemap.xml and
                                 robots.txt generation.

  --skip-search                  (Default: false) Skip search-index.json
                                 generation.

  --skip-rss                     (Default: false) Skip RSS feed generation.

  --skip-static                  (Default: false) Skip static HTML pages
                                 generation.

  --og-images                    (Default: false) Generate OG images using
                                 Playwright.

  --force-og                     (Default: false) Force regeneration of OG
                                 images even if they exist.

  --search-content-max-length    (Default: 10000) Maximum content length for

  -h, --hosting                  (Default: cloudflare) Hosting provider
                                 (cloudflare, netlify, vercel, github, none).

  --help                         Display this help screen.

  --version                      Display version information.

options.description: Path to the site project directory.
Force regeneration of OG images even if they exist.
Hosting provider (cloudflare, netlify, vercel, github, none).
Maximum content length for search index entries (default: 10000).
Site URL (reads from site.config.json if not specified).
